\sm[double]\SE[46]Waaah~, both carrots and potatoes on sale too, so cheap~~!
So there's heaven on earth after all, huh... Ufufuh--, fufufufuh....
\sm[nod]\SE[33]It's all so cheap, I might be able to get away with buying enough for a week--
\SE[25]I do have such a perfect muscleman tagging along with me too~
\SE[30-nb]Eheheh, I'll make sure to reward you for it, so don't worry.
\SE[40-nb]Let's see, I'll make whatever you like tonight, \n[1]!
Fufuh--, what do you wanna eat~?
Well then, we've got the ingredients for that too, so I think we should...
アニメーションタイプ = def
Oh my, if it isn't Shino-chan.
Doing shopping right after school? What a good girl you are.
If there's anything ever troubling you, ya gotta tell me, alright?
We're neighbours, so don't hold back with us.
\SE[29-nb]Yeah, both onee-chan and mom are working really hard for us, so we're fine--!
Thanks for always helping us out.
Oh, I see you tagged along with her, \n[1]-kun.
You almost look like a happily married couple like this~
You know, back in the day, my man and I...
We're still not at that stage yet, you know~!
This third wheel's gonna get out of you kids' hair now. See you.
See you later~, I'll come visit soon~!
\SE[42]Ahahah, we got teased real good there, huh?...
I guess from others' perspective... you know.
\SE[17]Huh? You found something that looks pretty tasty?
Jeez... that's the only thing that's ever on your mind, huh?
C'mon, we're going home! I'll leave all of the groceries to you!
What's got you so mad, Shino?
What's got you so mad, Shino?
I'll leave you behind, you know~!
As she ran off, something fell out of her bag, and I picked it up.
Thinking that it'd be better to return it when she's in a better mood, I
put it into my pocket (and promptly forgot about it)

\SM[pop]\sa[124]\SE[8]Huh? \n[1]? This is new, seeing you here.
You don't... seem to be here just to shop, huh?
I came because I thought she'd be here... isn't something I'm bold enough
to tell her, so instead I just made up an excuse about coming on a whim.
\SE[29-nb]This really isn't the place to be coming on a whim though...
Well, whatever. I'm having a hard time deciding what to make today,
so what do you want to eat today, \n[1]?
\SE[42]If you cook everyday, your cooking ends up tasting more or less the
same after a while, you know~? I want to expand my repertoire a bit more.

I couldn't think of anything right off the top of my head, so I ended up telling her that 
anything's fine.
\SM[double]\SE[16]Aah~~!! That's the last thing you should say when someone
asks you what you want to eat, you know~~!!
\SE[19]You're the one who's gonna have to suffer the consequences in the future, you know--!
Wouldn't you want something different to eat daily too~?
The one who'll suffer is me...? Just what does her cooking
repertoire have to do with my future?
\sa[128]\SE[8]Ah, ignore that... J-Just ignore what I said, please!
\SM[tremble]\sa[126]\SE[17]You don't need to think about it so deeply~! C'mon, you don't have any business here, right?
Go home, go home right now~! ...See you later--!
I didn't understand why, but Shino just turned away and said that it was
nothing worth discussing. ...She's right, I guess I shouldn't overthink it.
\sa[124]\SE[10]Ah, \n[1]~♪ Did you see my tweet and come to help
...If not then it's just a coincidence, huh? Maybe fate at work?
\SE[26]I was thinking of making all your favourites today,
that's actually why I'm out here, you know?
\se[34-nb]Fufufuh~, you better be grateful to yours truly, okay~?
Since you're here already, can I expect you to play the packmule?
...Easy as pie, if I get to eat my favourite stuff for dinner, so I told her.
Truly, life sometimes blesses you in unexpected ways.
\se[40-nb]Fufuh--, thanks~♪ Then let's go shopping together.
\sa[124]\SE[33-nb]Yepyep, I think that takes care of everything. Great~♪
As I was shopping with Shino while pushing the cart along,
a thought occured to me. ...It's like we're....
\se[55-nb]Hey, we're uhm... kinda like a.... huh?
...I couldn't really catch what she was mumbling, but as I was
thinking the same thing as her, I could tell what it was.
\sa[130]\SE[20]W-We should go home now. I... I'll leave it to you, okay?
...Feeling embarrassed at the gazes poking into us, we
quickly dragged our feet to the cash register, and paid our bill.
\SE[54-nb]I wonder if a time's gonna come when it won't be
This time, I could hear her mumbling clearly, but I pretended
not to and we quickly headed out on our way home.

I was feeling hungrier than usual today, so instead of the convenience store,
I came here, where food is more plentiful, cheaper, and in greater variety.
\sa[132]\SE[9]Perfect timing♪ Hey, tell me what you want to eat right now, I wanna know~
Is she having trouble deciding the dinner menu again?
...If I can work this well, I might be able to get her to make
I gave her a thumbs up and said [Leave it to me], trying to look cool.
Alright, bring it on~! Shino-san here will make it all--!
...Seems like she really was wondering what to make for dinner.
I'll try to talk up all of my favourites, maybe it'll help show her my enthusiasm..
I imagine all my favourites and list them off to her. Knowing that
a veritable feast might be waiting for me today made me even hungrier....
\SM[nod]\SE[22]Okay, mmhmm--, karaage, hamburg steaks... and omurice, huh?
All my favourites, made by her hand... just thinking about it is making me salivate.
The most I can do is probably just carry the ingredients and pay for them.
Just as I was opening my wallet, I heard the shocking reality from her.
\sa[128]\SE[28]Ah, sorry. I'm actually going to my part time job after this,
so I can't make dinner tonight.
...How could this be? After all that, I didn't think
\SE[29-nb]I just thought I'd make a note for the future, you know?
Fufuh--, I already know all your favourites to begin with, \n[1]~
\sa[126]\SE[18]Fufuh, I'm really sorry~. I should have told you beforehand.
It's almost time for my shift, so I'm gonna go. Thanks for keeping me company.

And so she left, while looking at me from the side, standing there
stock still, with a dumbfounded look on my face.
Left behind with nothing but my imagination of her hand cooking,
I ended up with a rumbling belly in the middle of the food area.
\sa[124]\SE[27]Eheheh, I'll make it all for you another time, okay?♪

Night shift really is boring~. I don't think anyone'd notice even if I sang out loud.
The cash registers are all self-operation ones too, so there's nothing to do...
Put the target in the center and, discard, discard, discard... there.
From the point of view of the customer, 24 hour operation really is convenient, isn't it~?
Fewer and fewer people come out at night lately though...
Now then, I guess I'll put some real elbow grease into it~

Food courts attached to supermarkets have a real unique atmosphere, don't they?
When you work the night shift everyday, it's nice to have shops that still serve you...
Seems like there's a place out there where you can remember all your memories at once...
This place is neither too rich, nor too deserted. Just perfect, really.

Don't you ever feel like just walking right between through couples holding hands while 
shopping?
